This implementation is      intentionally minimal:      - No upgradability. Redeploy if logic changes.      - No admin role. The bound AgentNFT is the only writer, set in the        constructor and immutable thereafter.      - No signature verification. params._agentNFT: The AgentNFT contract authorized to write to this        registry. Cannot be zero. Cannot be changed after deployment.

revoke(uint256,bytes32,address).details: AgentNFT is responsible for verifying owner authority before      calling this. This contract performs no signature checks of      its own; it trusts the caller, which is fixed at deploy time.

params.oldKeyHash: keccak256 of the wrappedDEK that is being destroyed.
params.revokedBy: The wallet on whose behalf revocation was triggered.

DESTROYED_SENTINEL().notice: The sentinel value written into `newKeyHash` to indicate the         DEK has been destroyed (not rotated). Equal to         keccak256("SOVEREIGNCLAW:DESTROYED:v1").

agentNFT().notice: The AgentNFT contract that may write to this registry.         Immutable after construction.

getRevocation(uint256).notice: Full revocation record. Reverts if the token has not been revoked.

isRevoked(uint256).notice: True if the token has been revoked. Cheap to call.

revoke(uint256,bytes32,address).notice: Record a revocation. Callable only by the bound AgentNFT.
